description: An auditor verifies that all new hires have completed the mandatory Code of Conduct training.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all employees hired in the last 6 months.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has the list of new hires.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the training completion report from the Learning Management System (LMS).

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has the list of all employees who completed the training.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two lists to ensure all new hires completed the training within 30 days of their start date, as required by policy.

expected_outcome.value: The comparison shows that 15 new hires are overdue for the training.
